title: constrained_by relation (ONT-R-04)
description: Generic constraint relation. USE FOR: Component(seat) constrained_by Requirement(weight_budget_15kg); AircraftSystem constrained_by Requirement(power_budget); Subsystem constrained_by Standard(operating_temperature_range). DO NOT USE FOR: explicit normative compliance with regulations / standards / certification clauses — that's complies_with (ONT-R-16). DO NOT USE FOR: hard regulatory compliance with audit trail — also complies_with. constrained_by is broader and includes budget / cost / non-normative constraints. Boundary per ADR-003 / D-11: constrained_by is generic (mass budget, cost ceiling, performance limit, soft regulation reference); complies_with is explicit normative compliance with audit-grade traceability. Schema version: 0.1.0.

constraint_kind.description: Optional. Nature of the constraint. Use 'regulatory_soft' for soft regulation references; for normative compliance use complies_with instead.
